key.name: remember-window-size
key.description: Remember the window size when the application is closed

key.name: window-width
key.description: Width of the main window

key.name: window-height
key.description: Height of the main window

key.name: window-maximized
key.description: Whether the window is maximized

key.name: always-on-top
key.description: Keep the window always on top

key.name: window-transparency
key.description: Transparency level of the window (0.0 = opaque, 1.0 = transparent)

key.name: font
key.description: Font used in the terminal

key.name: allow-bold
key.description: Allow bold text in the terminal

key.name: use-theme-colors
key.description: Use system theme colors instead of custom colors

key.name: foreground-color
key.description: Default foreground color

key.name: background-color
key.description: Default background color

key.name: background-transparency
key.description: Transparency level of the background (0.0 = opaque, 1.0 = transparent)

key.name: palette-colors
key.description: Color palette used for terminal colors

key.name: cursor-shape
key.description: Shape of the cursor (0=Block, 1=I-Beam, 2=Underline)

key.name: cursor-blink
key.description: Whether the cursor should blink

key.name: scrollback-lines
key.description: Number of lines to keep in scrollback buffer

key.name: scroll-on-output
key.description: Scroll to bottom when new output appears

key.name: scroll-on-keystroke
key.description: Scroll to bottom when a key is pressed

key.name: mouse-autohide
key.description: Hide mouse cursor while typing

key.name: copy-on-select
key.description: Automatically copy selected text to clipboard

key.name: word-chars
key.description: Characters considered part of a word for selection

key.name: allow-hyperlinks
key.description: Enable hyperlink detection and clicking

key.name: audible-bell
key.description: Play a sound when the terminal bell is rung

key.name: urgent-bell
key.description: Mark the window as urgent when the terminal bell is rung

key.name: custom-shell-command
key.description: Custom shell to use instead of default shell

key.name: run-custom-command
key.description: Run a custom command instead of shell

key.name: custom-command
key.description: Custom command to run instead of shell

key.name: close-tab-on-exit
key.description: Close tab when the shell process exits
